stemHtml: An aircraft departs from an aerodrome at 10:00 with a planned track of 090°T and a groundspeed of 100 kt. The wind correction angle for the planned flight is -5°. At 10:12 the aircraft is 2 NM off track to the left. What is the Track Error Angle and the actual Drift?

options.a: Track Error Angle: 6° Left; Actual Drift: 1° Left
options.b: Track Error Angle: 4° Left; Actual Drift: 2° Left
options.c: Track Error Angle: 1° Left; Actual Drift: 6° Left
options.d: Track Error Angle: 2° Left; Actual Drift: 4° Left
